title: Sous-Vide Paleo Cornmeal Delight
description: This weeknight Chinese-inspired dish is nutty and tender with a paleo-friendly twist using cornmeal cooked sous-vide style.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.amount: Enough to cover cornmeal completely in sous-vide bag

instructions: Combine cornmeal and water in a sous-vide bag.
Add apple cider vinegar, cayenne pepper (if using), and thyme leaves to the mixture.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Place the mixture in a preheated sous-vide machine at 132°F for about 4 hours or until cornmeal is tender but still holds its shape slightly.
Carefully remove the bag from the water bath and let it cool down to room temperature.
Serve the cooked cornmeal on top of steamed vegetables, greens, or as a gluten-free side dish.
